folio.label: 195v
folio.l: Se whicú braunes , hatú this gentil Preest
So gret a nekke , & swicú a large breest
He loketú as a S¹hauke , w hise eyen
Hi~ nedetú nat , his colour for to dygúen
W brasile , ne witú greyn of Portyngale
Now sire , faire falle ©ow , for ©oure tale
And after that , he w ful merie chere
Seide vn to a nother , as ©e shuln heere

note.notetxt: 16 A space of approximately ten lines precedes the explicit and incipit following.Est

folio.l: Heere endetú the Tale of the No~nes Preest ,
